title: Best Practice - Board Connections and Automations Specialist
excerpt:

posts.author: JGracey (Jerushah Williams-Gracey)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I work in the marketing department of a tech company where we have several boards for various marketing groups within the larger department. Most of the marketing team is pretty savvy in using Monday.com and I work on creating board templates and useful forms. Currently, I am working on a Main Board in order to create a Main Form where the team boards will feed into it without having to disrupt the current board’s styling.

We’re looking for someone that has done something similar for at least 1, preferable more companies that can design the best practice architecture and build out that structure. We’ve been in contact with two agencies that said they specialize in Monday.com, but they seem to focus more on board building and not architecture of many boards that need to work seamlessly together.

If you have experience in this area of Monday.com and would be interested in a project like this please let me know!

Note: Looking for a consultant/agency not FTE. Thank you.

Thanks,

JG

posts.author: francesco (Francesco Fiorini)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, Francesco here happy to help. Don’t hesitate to write to francesco.fiorini@omnidea.it to schedule a brief call.

Best

posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JGracey

I can recommend @Thomas-Omnitas for anything which has to do with connecting multiple boards.

posts.author: JGracey (Jerushah Williams-Gracey)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you both. We’ll reach out soon.

Hi @JGracey - We specialize in building complex workflows and automations across boards. I’d love to chat with you to learn more about your needs and see how we can help. Please book a time here and let’s chat: Book a call with Polished Geek: Do more with monday․com

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JGracey - thanks for posting this. We would be glad to look into this objective further with you to determine a best way forward. Always happy to help! Please reach out to me here directly or check out https://www.greenllamas.com for all of our information.

Take care,

Mark

info@greenllamas.com

posts.author: Thomas-Omnitas (Thomas Karlsson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @JGracey!
and thanks @basdebruin for the nice recommendation.

We at Omnitas Consulting are a monday first management consultancy firm. We have 8, soon to be 12 people working full time with monday.com. We are lead architect and designer in several joint processes with other partners and we focus on the workflows, exploring and understanding the desired effect and howe to best achieve it, not the boards them selves.

We have been awarded best professional services by monday.com themselves both 2019 and 2020.
If we were to work with you we would need an initial chat where you explain your needs and challenges in order for us to understand if we can help you reach your goals. First after such a meeting will we be able to provide a proper scope and quote.

Feel free to reach out in a DM in the community or send me a email (thomas@omnitas.se) to discuss and find a timing for such a meeting.

With regards,

posts.author: OliverChrome (Oliver Crombach)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @JGracey,

We have been awarded the APAC Partner of the year 2020 for delivering the best holistic builds for clients within the region. If you need help along the way you can reach out to me via oliver@jtscloud.com!

posts.author: JGracey (Jerushah Williams-Gracey)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for connecting everyone! We will be reaching out on an individual basis, this week and next.
